payload.label: tv
payload.long_description: Partial wall-mounted black flat-screen TV with a thin dark bezel and glossy reflective screen showing blurred vertical reflections; screen appears mostly dark/turned-off and the right edge is cropped by the image border — estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.
